title: Game-Only UI — Remove All Non-Game Pages and Chrome
description: Strip the app down to game-only. Remove sidebar, header, dashboard pages, sessions page, directives page, org page, prototype page, search palette, notifications, and scheduler. Simplify router and AppLayout.

scope.in: Delete all non-game page components, remove sidebar/header/AppLayout chrome, simplify router to game-only, remove SearchCommandPalette, remove useNotifications, remove SchedulerCard, clean up dead imports
scope.out: Game components, game panels, shared components used by game (ActivityLine, PipelineStepper, QuickActions, SendInput), UI primitives, stores, MCP server

dod.criterion: App renders GamePage full-screen with no sidebar, header, or wrapper chrome
All non-game page components deleted (dashboard/*, sessions/*, projects/*, org/*, prototype/*)
SearchCommandPalette, useNotifications hook, and SchedulerCard removed
Router has only game route(s), no dead routes
TypeScript compiles clean (npm run type-check passes)

tasks.title: Strip router to game-only and remove AppLayout chrome
tasks.user_scenario: The app loads directly into the full-screen game view with no sidebar, header, or navigation chrome.
tasks.scope: Remove all routes except game from router.tsx. Simplify AppLayout.tsx to just render Outlet (or remove it entirely and render GamePage directly). Remove Sidebar.tsx and Header.tsx imports and components. Remove SearchCommandPalette from AppLayout. Remove useNotifications hook usage. The game should fill the entire viewport.

dod.criterion: router.tsx has only the game route(s) — no /overview, /org, /directives, /sessions, /prototype, /teams routes
AppLayout renders without Sidebar, Header, or SearchCommandPalette
GamePage fills the full viewport with no surrounding chrome
App loads without errors at /

tasks.title: Delete all non-game page components and unused shared components
tasks.user_scenario: The codebase has no dead page components — only game code remains.
tasks.scope: Delete entire directories: src/components/dashboard/, src/components/sessions/, src/components/projects/, src/components/org/, src/components/prototype/. Delete src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx and src/components/layout/Header.tsx. Delete src/components/shared/SearchCommandPalette.tsx. Delete src/hooks/useNotifications.ts. Delete src/components/teams/ if not used by game. Remove any remaining dead imports across the codebase.

dod.criterion: src/components/dashboard/ directory deleted
src/components/sessions/ directory deleted
src/components/projects/ directory deleted
src/components/org/ directory deleted
src/components/prototype/ directory deleted
Sidebar.tsx, Header.tsx, SearchCommandPalette.tsx, useNotifications.ts deleted
No dead imports — TypeScript compiles clean

tasks.title: Verify game works and clean up any remaining dead code
tasks.user_scenario: The game loads, all HUD panels work, all interactive elements function correctly.
tasks.scope: Run type-check to find any remaining broken imports. Fix any issues. Verify the game's HUD panels (Team, Tasks, Ops, Log) still render correctly. Verify furniture click interactions work. Check that stores and hooks used only by deleted pages can be cleaned up from dashboard-store.ts if safe. Remove SchedulerCard references from any remaining code.

dod.criterion: npm run type-check passes with zero errors
Game loads at / and renders the canvas office
All 4 HUD panels (Team, Tasks, Ops, Log) open and render content
No references to deleted components remain in the codebase
